entry.title: New: CC 25-14 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
WATER AND INFRASTRUCTURE CHAIR, transmitting a proposed amendment to Resolution 25-129, entitled "AUTHORIZING THE ACQUISITION OF 1.724 ACRES IDENTIFIED FOR REAL PROPERTY TAX PURPOSES AS TAX MAP KEYS (2) 4-6-027:027, 029, 030, AND 041; (2) 4-6-027:026, 028, 033, AND 040; AND (2) 4-6-016:041, SITUATED AT LAHAINA, MAUI, HAWAIʻI, FOR UP TO $1,950,000, EXCLUSIVE OF CLOSING COSTS AND EXPENSES, UNDER SUBSECTION 3.44.015(C), MAUI COUNTY CODE".

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
